Container.Name: garage
Container.Overview: [b]Garage[/b]: S3-compatible distributed object storage, used here as the backing store for Milvus (replacing MinIO). [br] This image is a thin wrapper around upstream [i]dxflrs/garage:v2.3.0[/i] that reads every config value from env vars — no [i]garage.toml[/i] to edit. Secrets are auto-generated on first boot and persisted inside the metadata dir. [br] [b]Prerequisites (one-time):[/b] 1. Unraid UI → Settings → Docker → Add network → Name: [i]milvus-net[/i], Subnet: [i]172.18.0.0/16[/i] (or any private range). This is the shared bridge that garage, etcd, and milvus use to reach each other by container name. [br] [b]After first start:[/b] click the container icon → Console, then run [i]/garage bucket create milvus[/i] and [i]/garage key create milvus-key[/i] then [i]/garage bucket allow --read --write --owner milvus --key milvus-key[/i] then [i]/garage key info --show-secret milvus-key[/i]. Copy the Key ID + Secret key for the Milvus container's install form.
Container.Description: Garage is a lightweight, efficient, S3-compatible object store designed for geo-distributed deployment. This template uses ghcr.io/iknox/garage-env, an env-configurable wrapper of upstream Garage v2.3.0.

Config.Name: S3 API
Config.Description: S3-compatible HTTP API (the port Milvus talks to). Expose to LAN only if you want external S3 clients.

Config.Name: Admin API
Config.Description: Admin HTTP API — health checks and metrics.

Config.Name: Metadata
Config.Description: Metadata dir (LMDB/sqlite). MUST live on SSD / cache pool — never on /mnt/user. Secrets are persisted here as .garage-env-secrets.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Bulk data dir. Can live on the array for cheap storage; cache pool is fine too.

Config.Name: GARAGE_S3_REGION
Config.Description: S3 region string. Must match minio.region on the Milvus side (default 'garage' works end-to-end with our milvus template).

Config.Name: GARAGE_DB_ENGINE
Config.Description: Metadata DB engine: sqlite (default, simplest) or lmdb (slightly faster).

Config.Name: GARAGE_RPC_SECRET
Config.Description: Leave blank to auto-generate on first boot. Subsequent boots pick up the persisted value from the metadata dir.

Config.Name: GARAGE_ADMIN_TOKEN
Config.Description: Leave blank to auto-generate on first boot.

Config.Name: GARAGE_METRICS_TOKEN
Config.Description: Leave blank to auto-generate on first boot.
